Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.velocity

Class VotingPluginVelocity

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.velocity.VotingPluginVelocity
public class VotingPluginVelocity extends Object
VotingPlugin proxy implementation for Velocity. Reload behavior:
  • /vpp reload = small reload (config.reload + votingPluginProxy.reload)
  • /vpp reloadall = full reload (rebuild runtime, reload mysql, reload caches/tasks)

    • reloadAllInternal

      public void reloadAllInternal(boolean loadMysql)
      Reloads VotingPluginProxy on Velocity.

      Two modes:

      • Full reload (loadMysql=true): shuts down the old runtime, recreates the proxy, reconnects MySQL, then loads caches and handlers.
      • Soft reload (loadMysql=false): does NOT recreate the proxy instance (because it owns MySQL). Only reloads config and applies runtime-only settings via VotingPluginProxy.reload().
      Parameters:
      loadMysql - whether to rebuild MySQL and fully reinitialize the proxy

    • getMysqlConfig

      public com.bencodez.simpleapi.sql.mysql.config.MysqlConfig getMysqlConfig()
      Gets the MySQL configuration.

      Prefers the "Database" section if it exists and is usable. If the "Database" section is missing, not a map, or has no keys, falls back to legacy/root configuration parsing.

      Returns:
      mysql config (never null)

    • getGlobalDataMysqlConfig

      public com.bencodez.simpleapi.sql.mysql.config.MysqlConfig getGlobalDataMysqlConfig()
